message:
fix(sync): add PolledAfterCompletion guard to barrier wait future

BarrierWaitFuture now tracks a Done state to detect and reject
double-polling after the future has already resolved. Previously,
polling a completed barrier wait could re-enter the Init state
machine path, potentially causing a panic or incorrect barrier
count manipulation.

All completion paths (leader trip, generation advance, cancellation)
now transition to WaitState::Done. A poll in Done state immediately
returns BarrierWaitError::PolledAfterCompletion.

New test barrier_wait_second_poll_fails_closed verifies the guard.
Updated error Display, Clone/Copy/Eq, and Debug test coverage for
the new variant.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
